description_long: This is a modern, two-seater sofa upholstered in a textured blue fabric, featuring a clean-lined silhouette and a minimalist design. The sofa has two large, loose back cushions and two seat cushions, both of which are uniform in size and shape, providing a balanced and symmetrical appearance. The armrests are straight, medium-height, and extend from the backrest to the front edge, creating a boxy profile. The legs are short, slightly tapered, and made of wood, positioned at each corner for stability and a subtle lift off the ground. The upholstery has a subtle woven texture, giving the surface a matte, soft look with a hint of visual depth. This sofa would be suitable for urban environments such as apartment lobbies, waiting areas, or outdoor covered patios.
description: A modern blue two-seater sofa with straight armrests, loose back and seat cushions, and short wooden legs. The upholstery is textured and matte, giving it a soft, inviting appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large back cushions, two seat cushions, and straight armrests on both sides.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the sofa's boxy profile, straight armrest, and the thickness of the cushions.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous back panel and the subtle seam details along the upholstery.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, showing the straight armrest and the sofa's overall depth.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, loose back cushions and two matching seat cushions, all uniform in size and shape, arranged side by side.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, boxy armrests at medium height, extending from the backrest to the front edge, fully upholstered with no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, slightly tapered wooden legs positioned at each corner, exposed and providing a subtle lift.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight backrest with two large, loose cushions, continuous and unsegmented.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid blue fabric with a subtle woven texture, no visible patterns or decorative stitching.
